description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: tests and coverage. The tests job runs on ubuntu-20.04 with a matrix of Python versions from 3.7 to 3.13, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, runs tox targets, and uploads coverage data. The coverage job runs on ubuntu-20.04, depends on the tests job, downloads coverage data, combines coverage reports, and uploads an HTML report if the coverage is less than 100%.
